title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo – get up and running with Llama 3, Mistral, Gemma and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python SDK for Ollama; chat, generate, embed, pull/push models with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node & browsers; same API surface as the Python SDK.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain adapter that turns any Ollama model into a drop-in LLM for chains, agents, retrieval, etc.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (chat, model manager, RAG, multi-user) – run docker-compose up.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Community-built interactive REPL with syntax highlighting, history, and prompt templates.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: Experimental GitHub-Copilot-like plugin for VS Code that uses local Ollama models instead of OpenAI.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU autoscaling.

title: ollama-nvim
summary: Neovim plugin to generate, refactor, explain or chat with code using any Ollama model.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal retrieval-augmented-generation stack using Ollama + Chroma + LangChain in 100 lines.

title: ollama-mcp
summary: Model Context Protocol server that exposes Ollama completions to any MCP-compatible client.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration letting you use Ollama models for generative QA, summarization and agents.

title: ollama-discord-bot
summary: Self-hostable Discord bot that brings local LLM chat to any server with slash commands.

title: ollama-django
summary: Reusable Django app providing an async chat API endpoint backed by Ollama.

title: ollama-fastapi
summary: FastAPI microservice template that wraps Ollama with JWT auth, rate-limiting and Prometheus metrics.

title: ollama-streamlit
summary: Streamlit chat playground for comparing multiple Ollama models side-by-side in real time.

title: ollama-terraform
summary: Terraform module to provision GPU-enabled AWS EC2 instances with Ollama pre-installed.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Unofficial but fully-async Rust crate for the Ollama REST API with Tokio.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: Community-maintained C# SDK targeting .NET 6+; supports chat, generate, embeddings and model ops.

title: awesome-ollama
summary: Curated list of libraries, tools, tutorials and model recipes from the Ollama community.
